GFQG0aNbKHXc4s0EWTym.resolution: Fix guideline selection checkpoint modal placement - moved to overlay modal

PDYmePZLMJN5Ma9ovvtS.issue: Compound field formatting (Systolic 130 → BP 130/74 at 30 weeks)
PDYmePZLMJN5Ma9ovvtS.resolution: Add LLM-based formatting endpoint /formatClinicalData to format clinical measurements naturally

shJ0PmrV9wE70rUNuYIb.issue: Hemorrhage risk suggestions lack clinical context (missing personnel/equipment details)
shJ0PmrV9wE70rUNuYIb.resolution: Enhanced guideline analysis prompt to require specific personnel, equipment, and contingencies for high-risk scenarios

FCaEIY34StYxbsvJdRtN.issue: Insertion preview appears to already be in the note before pressing Insert
FCaEIY34StYxbsvJdRtN.resolution: Added 'Pending insertion — press Insert to confirm:' label above preview text; strengthened CSS with dashed green border and distinct label styling

5aZWNziguX031uRi2VNM.issue: Suggestions placed in text before pressing Insert with no visual distinction
5aZWNziguX031uRi2VNM.resolution: Same as FCaEIY34 — insertion preview now clearly labelled as pending with green dashed border

IVecsVQIPnaPEg2cFyiY.issue: Missing info wizard asked for gestational age when already present in note (32+4)
IVecsVQIPnaPEg2cFyiY.resolution: Strengthened /assessNoteCompletenessStructured prompt rule 3 with explicit examples: '32+4' means gestation IS present, '28yo' means age IS present — scan entire note including headers

2WzE4ElzGeHa0P1iZ600.issue: Missing info wizard asked for patient age when already present in note (28yo)
2WzE4ElzGeHa0P1iZ600.resolution: Same as IVecsVQIPnaPEg2cFyiY — prompt now explicitly flags age and gestational age detection from headers/opening lines

jpXN8upMafJ115p3Sdcz.issue: Insertion preview text leaked into committed note content
jpXN8upMafJ115p3Sdcz.resolution: Replaced DOM-injection approach with content-based INSERTION_PLACEHOLDER (⟨TEXT TO BE INSERTED HERE⟩) inserted via TipTap API; on Insert placeholder is replaced in-place, on Skip/Close it is removed cleanly

bqoT6kxvzkUowrKMPbmu.issue: Existing placeholder line in note (e.g. 'Blood Pressure') not highlighted before user fills wizard
bqoT6kxvzkUowrKMPbmu.resolution: showInsertionPreview now replaces the replace_pattern/missing_info line with the styled ⟨TEXT TO BE INSERTED HERE⟩ placeholder so the user can see exactly where their input will land

spE6nFMSxmW4clntuNJ4.issue: Completeness wizard asked for BP when note said 'vital signs within normal limits'
spE6nFMSxmW4clntuNJ4.resolution: Rewrote /assessNoteCompletenessStructured prompt using reasoning principles: implied information counts as present — model now uses clinical judgement rather than pattern matching

jAoIciFHzAkYJ0XRwbS6.issue: Completeness wizard asked for consent documentation when risks already documented in note
jAoIciFHzAkYJ0XRwbS6.resolution: Same as spE6nFMSxmW4clntuNJ4 — prompt rewrite instructs model to treat logically implied information as present

5m987u2bnucLNSyodmuS.issue: Review all vs high-only step is unhelpful, should default to all sorted by priority
5m987u2bnucLNSyodmuS.resolution: showSummaryDashboard was already dead code — current flow goes directly to wizard with suggestions sorted high→medium→low. Removed the unused function.

gPHsO6UptY5sQzJgURF0.resolution: Fixed in v9.0.25 (id= uniqueId added to sw-wrap); this submission was before that deploy
